VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 30 Euros (Tax) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:

- The applicable visa fee in Manat is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The applicable Visa Fee and Service fee are as per the current rate of exchange set by the Embassy of Slovakia. They are subject to change without any notice.

The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted. Please note that the period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
Schengen (C) Visa 
- Schengen visa applications are accepted only on Wednesdays between 09:00–16:00.
- The embassy takes 5–10 working days to evaluate the application and send the approved appointment date.
- Email subject should include:
- C visa / Applicant’s Name
- Email body should include:
- D visa / Agency Name + Company ID / Applicant’s Name / Date of Birth / Passport Number / Email and Phone / Purpose of Travel / Scan of Last Schengen Visa and Border Stamp
- If you haven’t received a confirmation email, your appointment has not been approved.
- Once approved, VFS Global will call you, and you must visit the center on the confirmed date to submit your visa.
- Applications are accepted at the VFS center between 09:00–12:00 and 13:00–17:00.
Note: This procedure does not apply in the following cases:
- Invitations for sports clubs, cultural, or other events
- Official trips or invitations from various institutions
- Invitations for close family members
- Students (ERASMUS, VISEGRAD FUND, etc.)
- List of required documents:
- https://visa.vfsglobal.com/aze/en/svk (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/aze/en/svk/)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
Schengen (C) Visa 
- Schengen visa applications are accepted only on Wednesdays between 09:00–16:00.
- The embassy takes 5–10 working days to evaluate the application and send the approved appointment date.
- Email subject should include:
- C visa / Applicant’s Name
- Email body should include:
- D visa / Agency Name + Company ID / Applicant’s Name / Date of Birth / Passport Number / Email and Phone / Purpose of Travel / Scan of Last Schengen Visa and Border Stamp
- If you haven’t received a confirmation email, your appointment has not been approved.
- Once approved, VFS Global will call you, and you must visit the center on the confirmed date to submit your visa.
- Applications are accepted at the VFS center between 09:00–12:00 and 13:00–17:00.
Note: This procedure does not apply in the following cases:
- Invitations for sports clubs, cultural, or other events
- Official trips or invitations from various institutions
- Invitations for close family members
- Students (ERASMUS, VISEGRAD FUND, etc.)
- List of required documents:
- https://visa.vfsglobal.com/aze/en/svk (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/aze/en/svk/)

## Visa Fees

[svk > aze > en > Table:Tourism Visa > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 30 Euros (Tax) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note: 
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Manat is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The applicable Visa Fee and Service fee are as per the current rate of exchange set by the Embassy of Slovakia. They are subject to change without any notice.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted. Please note that the period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form: 
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

The diplomatic mission may grant the national visa only after prior consent of the Ministry of Interior of the Slovak Republic.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/baku-en).
National (D) Long-Term Visa
Applications for a national visa can be submitted through the VFS Global Slovakia Visa Center in Baku after prior approval by the embassy.
How to submit an application:
- National visa applications can only be submitted after prior approval by the embassy. To get approval, send an email to: appointments.baku@mzv.sk (mailto:appointments.baku@mzv.sk).
- Applications are accepted via email on every “odd Tuesday” between 09:00–16:00.
- “Every odd Tuesday” means Tuesdays that fall on an odd date of the month.
- For example, February 2026:
- Tuesdays in February: 3, 10, 17, 24
- Odd dates: 3 and 17 ✅
- Even dates: 10 and 24 ❌
- The Slovak embassy requires 5–10 working days to evaluate the application and send the approved appointment date.
- Emails sent before or after the specified registration days are invalid and will not be answered.
- Email subject should include:
- D visa / Agency Name + Company ID / Applicant’s Name
- Email body should include:
- Agency Name + Company ID / Applicant’s Name / Passport Number / Email and Phone Contact
- If the applicant is applying individually, the AZ/SR contact person must be indicated.
- After approval:
- Once the embassy approves the application, VFS Global Slovakia Baku Visa Center will contact you by phone, and you will submit your visa at the center on the confirmed date.
- You can submit the visa application at VFS between 09:00–12:00 and 13:00–17:00.
Note: This procedure does not apply to applications under the Slovak Republic Government regulations 113/2023, 521/2021, and 269/2022. In those cases, applications can be registered via email on any working day.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/baku-en).
National (D) Long-Term Visa
Applications for a national visa can be submitted through the VFS Global Slovakia Visa Center in Baku after prior approval by the embassy.
How to submit an application:
- National visa applications can only be submitted after prior approval by the embassy. To get approval, send an email to: appointments.baku@mzv.sk (mailto:appointments.baku@mzv.sk).
- Applications are accepted via email on every “odd Tuesday” between 09:00–16:00.
- “Every odd Tuesday” means Tuesdays that fall on an odd date of the month.
- For example, February 2026:
- Tuesdays in February: 3, 10, 17, 24
- Odd dates: 3 and 17 ✅
- Even dates: 10 and 24 ❌
- The Slovak embassy requires 5–10 working days to evaluate the application and send the approved appointment date.
- Emails sent before or after the specified registration days are invalid and will not be answered.
- Email subject should include:
- D visa / Agency Name + Company ID / Applicant’s Name
- Email body should include:
- Agency Name + Company ID / Applicant’s Name / Passport Number / Email and Phone Contact
- If the applicant is applying individually, the AZ/SR contact person must be indicated.
- After approval:
- Once the embassy approves the application, VFS Global Slovakia Baku Visa Center will contact you by phone, and you will submit your visa at the center on the confirmed date.
- You can submit the visa application at VFS between 09:00–12:00 and 13:00–17:00.
Note: This procedure does not apply to applications under the Slovak Republic Government regulations 113/2023, 521/2021, and 269/2022. In those cases, applications can be registered via email on any working day.

## Visa Fees

[svk > aze > en > Table:National Visa – Employment > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 30 Euros (Tax) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note: 
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Manat is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The applicable Visa Fee and Service fee are as per the current rate of exchange set by the Embassy of Slovakia. They are subject to change without any notice.

## Documents Required
Application Form – Click here
For more information : https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/dilli-en/services/national-visa (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/dilli-en/services/national-visa)

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 30 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted. The diplomatic mission may grant the national visa only after prior consent of the Ministry of Interior of the Slovak Republic.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form: 
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visit to family or friend visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting your family member or friend.
General Public are hereby informed that family members of EU citizen are kindly requested to contact Embassy of Slovakia in ,Delhi pertaining to submission of their documents for visa.
Schengen (C) Visa 
- Schengen visa applications are accepted only on Wednesdays between 09:00–16:00.
- The embassy takes 5–10 working days to evaluate the application and send the approved appointment date.
- Email subject should include:
- C visa / Applicant’s Name
- Email body should include:
- D visa / Agency Name + Company ID / Applicant’s Name / Date of Birth / Passport Number / Email and Phone / Purpose of Travel / Scan of Last Schengen Visa and Border Stamp
- If you haven’t received a confirmation email, your appointment has not been approved.
- Once approved, VFS Global will call you, and you must visit the center on the confirmed date to submit your visa.
- Applications are accepted at the VFS center between 09:00–12:00 and 13:00–17:00.
Note: This procedure does not apply in the following cases:
- Invitations for sports clubs, cultural, or other events
- Official trips or invitations from various institutions
- Invitations for close family members
- Students (ERASMUS, VISEGRAD FUND, etc.)
- List of required documents:
- https://visa.vfsglobal.com/aze/en/svk (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/aze/en/svk/)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
Schengen (C) Visa 
- Schengen visa applications are accepted only on Wednesdays between 09:00–16:00.
- The embassy takes 5–10 working days to evaluate the application and send the approved appointment date.
- Email subject should include:
- C visa / Applicant’s Name
- Email body should include:
- D visa / Agency Name + Company ID / Applicant’s Name / Date of Birth / Passport Number / Email and Phone / Purpose of Travel / Scan of Last Schengen Visa and Border Stamp
- If you haven’t received a confirmation email, your appointment has not been approved.
- Once approved, VFS Global will call you, and you must visit the center on the confirmed date to submit your visa.
- Applications are accepted at the VFS center between 09:00–12:00 and 13:00–17:00.
Note: This procedure does not apply in the following cases:
- Invitations for sports clubs, cultural, or other events
- Official trips or invitations from various institutions
- Invitations for close family members
- Students (ERASMUS, VISEGRAD FUND, etc.)
- List of required documents:
- https://visa.vfsglobal.com/aze/en/svk (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/aze/en/svk/)

## Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. - If you haven’t received a confirmation email, your appointment has not been approved.

Note: This procedure does not apply in the following cases:
- Invitations for sports clubs, cultural, or other events
- Official trips or invitations from various institutions
- Invitations for close family members
- Students (ERASMUS, VISEGRAD FUND, etc.)
- List of required documents:
- https://visa.vfsglobal.com/aze/en/svk (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/aze/en/svk/)

## Visa Fees

[svk > aze > en > Table:Business/ Conference > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 30 Euros (Tax) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note: 
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Manat is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The applicable Visa Fee and Service fee are as per the current rate of exchange set by the Embassy of Slovakia. They are subject to change without any notice.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted. 

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form:

OR

- Select Save Target As from the list
